titleStmt.title: SII 35.74: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 74. (A.R. No. 81 of 1952-53.) BYĀHAṬṬI, HUBLI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Tōṭadappana maṭha.
This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 1157, Manmatha, Śrāvaṇa ba. Amāvāsya, solar eclipse. The details correspond to A.D. 1235, August 15, Wednesday.

Records a gift of land to the Gaṅgādhara-bhaṭṭa, Harihara-bhaṭṭa, Nākaṇa-bhaṭṭa, Kallibhaṭṭa, Yisvara-bhaṭṭa, Maneyadhara-bhaṭṭa, Kēsava-bhaṭṭa, Aditya-bhaṭṭa, Pavadēva-bhaṭṭa, Bhāskarabhaṭṭa, Māyidēva-bhaṭṭa, Vāmana-bhaṭṭa Vāmana-paṇḍita, Mādhava-bhaṭṭa, Rāya-bhaṭṭa, Bhaṭṭōpādhya, Purushōtama-bhaṭṭa, Māyidēva-bhaṭṭa for the prosperity of the king's rule and their own family by Ponna-Bommiseṭṭi and Chauḍiseṭṭi, when Mahāsāmantādhipati Mahāpradhāna Mahāmātya Malliseṭṭi was governing Beḷovla Three Hundred, Puligere Three Hundred and Banavāsi Twelve Thousand. The gift was entrusted to the Mahājanas of Bērpaṭṭi, whose virtues are described.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ śrī
dharaṁ yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāsabhāskara maṁ
ya salise late lāḷarāU saledācāryya
yanāma
rddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire .
tārtthijana laya karṇna
rārājipariṁtu śiṁdare siṁghaṇarāya
yiḷe
śiṣṭa mahā sāmaṁtādhipati mahāpradhānaṁ śrīmadāryya malliseṭṭiyaru beḷvola mū
nūṟu huligeṟemūnūṟu banavasepaṁnitsāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyutta
mire . Ātana saccaritraveṁtene . surapatigā brehaspati lasadvita sūnuge bhārggavaṁ divaranimapati matsara
bhuviṁge yugaṁdhara maṁtriyaṁte taṁ narapati siṁghaṇaṁge negaḷdāriyamallane maṁtriyāgi
dana rājya vibhavōnnatiyaṁ nijamaṁtraśaktiyiṁ . Ātana tanayarirbbaru jāta dēśaṁgaḷa Adinādi
khyāta guṇa hoṁnabaṁmaṁ bhūtaḷanutanāryyaboṁma dhanajaḷanāmāḷdaru . samudayaṁ pālidataraṁ śrīmaprā
mareṁdāśipa dvijatva rakṣada pūrvvadattiyanu tāṁkadirppa dhammaṁgaḷaṁ sājata ghūṁrṇnise māḷpa tākiraḷidā
dimappanaṁgaja rūpaṁ guṇa hoṁnaboṁmmanuru kīrttiśrī maṁdaraṁ vallabhaṁ . nayaṁ viprajanā trigaḷanatyu
na bhūtaḷamellaṁ pogaḷvaṁdadiṁ vipuḷa dānaṁ pūjeyaṁ māḷpa dōrvvaladi haṁdi jaḷā pēḷavana
ji viḷasadbhūtaḷadalliyāryya camuṁḍaṁ gōtrātaḷaṁ baṇnisalu . bijeyāryya maṁtrija sūnu rasō
tānāgaḷbhujabaḷaṁ bērppaṭṭiya sadvijarggittaṁ camuṁḍaneseye bahuvrittigaḷaṁ . Ātanagrajaṁ . karayesege
ḷuru mudadiṁ dhāreyeṟedu bērppaṭṭiya bhāsura viprajanake koṭṭaṁ varaguṇanidhi koṁnaboṁmaṁ .
Avarāḷva nāḍiṁge cūḍāmaṇiyenisida rājadhāni bērppaṭṭiya guṇavarṇnanaveṁtane . baḷasirdda naṁdanavanadiṁ
ppa keṟegaḷiṁ grihā yiṁdagaḷiṁ kōṭeyōḷbērppaṭṭi dhare pogaḷaluṁ doreyē . surabhiyaniḷisuvahaṁ
rinalaṟuvattokkalaṁ paṁcamaṭhōtkaredira siṁgagatoṁḍa mudadiṁde nripōttamariṁ . Alliya
stajarabaḷavejaṁtamā sālinoḷippurusa kaḷā kaḷālaḷita guṇāḍhyara bhṛtsōmaḷa bhaktaru . yamaniyama
dhyānavagnihōtraṁ yajñaṁ tamagesadire māḍidarssavāne Ā dharmmamenisidā . yoḷesakaṁ .
doḷu śakavarṣaṁ 1157 neya manumathasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷadamāvāse
sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu hoṁnaboṁmiseṭṭiyaruṁ cavuḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ siṁghaṇadēva rājyābhyudayārtthamāgi ya
ryyādeyārtthamāgiyuṁ bērppaṭṭiya mahājanaṁgaḷa gṛhakṣētraṁgaḷaṁ sarvvanama
trakke cavuḍikā ṁgaḷa sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe dāriyiṁ paḍuvalu
baḍagalu cala mūḍageṟeyiṁ teṁkalu
bhumareyoḷage 48 gēṇa kōlalu prathama sthaḷadali śa
ge vritti 10 matta 2 Alliṁ paḍuvalu haritagōtrada sōmadēvabhaṭṭa
bhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge ma 2 viśvāmitragōtrada śa
rabhaṭṭargge ma 1 Alliṁ baḍagalu vaśiṣṭagōtrada sōmadēva
śāṁḍilyagōtrada
lu viśvāmitragōtrada brahmadēvabhaṭṭa
da kṛṣṇaṁbhaṭṭargge maḷavanu
kāśyapagōtrada bā
śaṁkaraghaisarige ka 2 bāḷa
gōtrada bubayyaṁgaḷige
ge 2 kāśyapa gōtrada
bēhaṭṭiya mahājanaṁ para
bhāradvājagōtrada jannabhaṭṭargge ma 6 bhāradvā
bhaṭṭargge da purāṇada mādēva
dēvabhaṭṭargge ma 2 bhāradvājagōtrada boppe sthaḷadalli vaśiṣṭagōtrada gōpa
raṁge ma 2 vaśiṣṭagōtrada boppe
ralliṁ vidurama bhāradvājagōtrada bhāraṇnaṁgaḷige ma 1 Ātrēyagōtrada hiriyaṇnaṁgaḷge ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada ma 4 A
ma 2 Ā gaṁgādharabhaṭṭargge ma 2 Ā hariharabhaṭṭargge ma 2 jaṁnadabhaṭṭargge ma 2 māpagoraḷa śaṁkarabhaṭṭargge ma 2 vīrabhaṭṭa
ttar 2 bhāradvāja gōtrada parada sūrayyaṁgaḷge ma 2 haritagōtrada puruṣōttamabhaṭṭagge ma 2 Eraḍaneya sthaḷadalli prakave
vā sagōtrakke satrakke ma 4 nākaṇabhaṭṭargge ma 2 kallibhaṭṭargge ma 2 bhāradvājagōtrada paddayaṁge ma 4 kaṁbave
yaṁge ma 2 khaṁḍikakke ma 2 Ātrēyagōtra brahmadēvage ma 4 Eṁṭaneya sthaḷadalli prathama kaṇva gōtrada śivadēvappaṁgaḷge
ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada dhanēśvararupādhyāyargge ma 4 kāśyapagōtrada kallibhaṭṭargge ma 2 vatsagōtrada U
mēśvarabhaṭṭargge ma 4 gautamagōtrada mallarasargge ma 1 bhaṭṭavrittige ma 2 voṁbhattaneya sthaḷadalli kāśyapa
gōtrada taṁtramaṁtradācāryya viṭhayyaṁge ma 4 kāśyapagōtrada māyidharabhaṭṭagge ma 4 bhāradvājagōtrada kēśava
bhaṭṭargge ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada Ādityabhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge ma 2 kaṇvagōtrada śivadēvabhaṭṭargge ma 2 kāśyapagōtra
da bhāskarabhaṭṭargge ma 6 kāmadēvāyanagōtrada māyidēvabhaṭṭargge ma 2 kāśyapagōtrada huligeṟeya mayyaṁ
gaḷge ma 2 siripayyaṁge ma 2 hattaneya sthaḷadalli bhaṭṭarige ma 4 kāśyapagōtrada vāmanabhaṭṭargge ma 4
kāśyapagōtrada gōpāḷadāsargge ma 4 vāmanapaṁḍitargge ma 2 Āhita viśvāmitragōtrada huḍige sōmaṇnaṁgaḷge ma 4
kāśyapagōtrada mādhavabhaṭṭargge ma 2 vaśiṣṭagōtra dēvaṇnayyaṁgaḷge ma 2 haṁnoṁ
daneya sthaḷadalli bhāradvājagōtrada rāyabhaṭṭargge ma 2 bhāradvājagōtrada mūrttināraṇnaṁgaḷge ma 2 śāṁḍilyagōtrada vā
manamūrttigaḷge ma 6 vaśiṣṭagōtrada yajñēśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge ma 4 yāṟaneya sthaḷadali puruśōttamabhaṭṭarige daṁpama
vāṟu kāśyapagōtrada māyidēvabhaṭṭargge ma 1 Eṁṭaneya sthaḷadali
lōkēśvaradiṁ baḍaga nūrumaṁ mūḍalu kōśikagōtrada gōvāse cavuḍaṇnaṁgaḷa maga © svasti śrīmatu yā
davanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapratāpa cakravartti śrīsiṁghaṇadēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi yāriya malliseṭṭiyara mamaṁ yalagulinātana sarvadhikāri
seṭṭiyara besadiṁ suṁkave dhareyoḷarasaru śrīmatu bēhaṭṭiya sarvvanamasyada brahmapuriya
hājanaṁgaḷige hēṟondu nalasaṁvatsarada puśya bahuḷadamāvāseyādivāra byatīpāta
bara Aliyarddōdayadalu Amedayanaṁgaṁge suṁka 4 nu sarvvanamaśyavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
biṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭarvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 35.74 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
